item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer brakes the requested N+1 manual gate immediately by default-refusing the refrigerator-side confirmer. It recognizes the repeated pattern of prior downstream manual checks, moves the diagnosis upstream to ownership, visibility, and control failures in shared resources/cold-chain handoff, and proposes a structural owner/process reset rather than adding another checker."}
